note: Forced auto-reload bump: the explorer polls this file every 60s and calls location.reload() when the version string changes (skipping reload only while a TX/block detail panel is open). v177 carries the same code as v176; the bump exists purely to push every open explorer tab onto the latest capsule rendering (callout-style 'capsule text' block, IN/OUT subtitled headers, payment/change split, RPC mode badge, etc.) without making each visitor hit Ctrl+Shift+R. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO transaction format.
